all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And the Lord heard the voice of Elijah; and the soul of the child came into him again, and he revived.
1 Kings 17:22
Quote of the Day
"The temple stands as a symbol of hope, not pressure."
Elder Taniela B. Wakolo | 1 Apr 2026General Conference
